name: Whiskas Adult Cat Pouch Tuna 85g
description: Give your cat the perfect mix of taste, nutrition, and happiness with WHISKAS 1+ Tuna Adult Cat Food in Jelly . Specially crafted to preserve the natural goodness and irresistible flavour of high-quality ingredients, this complete and balanced meal provides everything your adult cat needs to stay healthy, active, and full of life. Made with sustainably sourced fish and meats, each pouch delivers a satisfying meaty texture and nourishing jelly that cats can’t resist. WHISKAS 1+ Tuna in Jelly is formulated with your cat’s long-term health in mind. Packed with essential vitamins, minerals, and high-quality proteins, it supports strong muscles, a shiny coat, and natural immunity. It’s more than just a meal it’s everyday nourishment that shows your cat just how much you care. Key Benefits Delicious & Nutritious: Made with 100% high-quality ingredients for complete and balanced nutrition. Supports Strong Muscles: Contains high-quality protein to maintain muscle strength and vitality. Boosts Natural Defences: Enriched with Vitamin C to help support your cat’s immune system. Healthy Skin & Coat: Includes zinc to promote soft, healthy fur and overall skin health. Sustainably Sourced: We are committed to reducing our environmental impact fish in our wet food recipes is responsibly and sustainably sourced. Ingredients Meat and Animal Derivatives (33%), Fish and Fish Derivatives (including 4% Tuna in the Chunk), Cereals, Minerals, Derivatives of Vegetable Origin, Various Sugars. Chunk typically 40% of product. Nutritional Information Analytical Constituents (%): Protein 7.8 | Fat 4.0 | Inorganic Matter 1.6 | Crude Fibre 0.25 | Moisture 84.5 Additives per kg: Nutritional Additives: Vitamin C (702 mg), Taurine (620 mg), Copper (11.2 mg), Manganese (2.2 mg), Zinc (16.2 mg) Technological Additives: Cassia gum (2148 mg) Sensory Additives: Flavourings Feeding Guidelines Adjust feeding amounts according to your cat’s age, size, and activity level. Serve at room temperature and always provide fresh drinking water. Diet Transition When introducing WHISKAS 1+ Tuna Adult Cat Food, do so gradually over 7 days to avoid stomach upset: Days 1–2: 25% new food / 75% old food Days 3–4: 50% new food / 50% old food Days 5–6: 75% new food / 25% old food Day 7+: 100% new food Maintain consistent mealtimes and feeding areas during this transition. Consult your veterinarian if you notice any changes in appetite or digestion. Storage Instructions Store unopened pouches in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate unused portions and serve within 24 hours. Why Choose WHISKAS 1+ Tuna in Jelly Complete and balanced meal for adult cats Supports muscles, immunity, and coat health Made with 100% high-quality ingredients Sustainably sourced fish for environmental care A delicious, meaty meal cats adore
